creator: key@Network-Alchemy.COM
text:
On A fresh FreeBSD v4.2 RELEASE install, using:

  /usr/ports/x11-servers/XFree86-4-Server/

it still dies in building bsd_jstk.c in exactly the same way
as reported in ports/19151.  This port uses the xc/X401src-1.tgz, if
that is of any help.

Regards,
Ken Key
--
Ken Key (key@cips.nokia.com, key@network-alchemy.com)  
Nokia,  Clustering IP Solutions, Santa Cruz, CA
